top_signals.title: Oil Climbs as US Strikes Targets in Iran Following Ship Attacks
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped as the US struck targets in Iran in retaliation for a spate of attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, ramping up tensions across the energy-rich region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Temasek-Backed Foundation Healthcare Debuts Flat in Singapore
top_signals.summary: Foundation Healthcare Holdings Ltd opened unchanged from its initial public offering price on Wednesday in Singapore after a listing that was the largest of the year so far in the city state outside real estate investment trusts.

top_signals.title: Despite the green light, challenges lie ahead for Japan’s maglev project
top_signals.summary: Central Japan Railway now expects the train line's opening to be in 2036, at the earliest, even if construction kicks off by the end of this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ACUA Ocean USV Collects 100 Hours of Continuous Multi-Domain Data
top_signals.summary: ACUA Ocean's Mk1 USV PIONEER has successfully completed a five-day remotely operated offshore demonstration, validating persistent, multi-domain maritime operations using an uncrewed surface vessel.On Monday 22 June 2026, PIONEER departed Turnchapel Wharf…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In a moment of transition, Southeast Asia steps up
top_signals.summary: The APR is probably the best single opportunity to get the regional zeitgeist on issues of geopolitics and economics.
